message:
perf(h2): Zero-copy header/body ownership transfer

Response struct now tracks ownership of headers and body:
- owns_headers: Whether Response should free header strings
- owns_body: Whether Response should free body data

Stream gains takeHeaders() and takeBody() methods that transfer
ownership to caller (zero-copy), avoiding duplicate allocations.

Before: Frame → HPACK Decoder → Stream → Response (3 allocations/header)
After:  Frame → HPACK Decoder → Stream → Response (1 allocation/header)

Estimated savings: ~65% fewer allocations per HTTP response
